title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 50.440 - Penalties may be remitted, when
text:
50.440.  Penalties may be remitted, when. — If good cause be shown for setting aside the settlement, the commission may examine the accounts, settle and adjust the same according to law, and in their discretion remit the penalties imposed.
(RSMo 1939 § 13820) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12158; 1919 § 9556; 1909 § 3777
